channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Trump turns America 250 kickoff into a campaign-style rally on the National Mall
item.description: President Donald Trump sees America’s 250th anniversary as a chance to get the country excited again — about Donald Trump.

item.title: Mamdani proves his power in New York House races, plus more takeaways from Tuesday’s primaries
Mamdani slate sweeps Democratic primaries in New York, ousts 2 incumbents from Congress
